metadata.description:
GripTab displays MIDI items as live guitar tablature in a floating window.
Features: - Converts MIDI notes to guitar tab (6-string, configurable tuning) - Playhead cursor follows playback in real time - 10 tuning presets: Standard, Drop D, Open G, DADGAD and more - Proportional spacing — pauses are shown as empty space - Zoom with +/- or Ctrl+wheel - Auto-scroll during playback
